highlights.description: Bridge goauth credentials with vault-based storage via omnivault
Full token lifecycle management with automatic refresh

added.description: Core `TokenManager` for credential and token lifecycle operations
`Config` struct with validation and sensible defaults
Convenience constructor `NewFromVaultURI` for vault URI initialization
Convenience constructor `NewFromCredentialsFile` for loading goauth CredentialsSet files
Convenience constructor `NewFromCredentials` for single credential initialization
Convenience constructor `NewFromEnv` for environment variable configuration
Convenience constructor `NewFromDirectory` for loading credentials from directory
Support for OAuth2 credentials (client credentials, authorization code)
Support for JWT bearer token credentials
Support for HTTP Basic Auth credentials
Support for Google Cloud service account credentials
Automatic token refresh with configurable buffer time
Background token refresh for long-running applications

documentation.description: MCP server example with ToolContext pattern

tests.description: Unit tests for TokenManager lifecycle operations
